caption: A woman with dark hair, wearing a black blazer over a light-colored top, stands in a room giving a presentation. She is positioned to the left of a large projection screen that displays a white background with the heading "METAPHORS WE LIVE BY" in capital letters. The screen lists several phrases: "You're wasting my time.", "This gadget will save you hours.", "How do you spend your time these days?", "I've invested a lot of time in her.", and "You need to budget your time." Below these, the names "GEORGE LAKEOFF AND MARK JOHNSON" are visible. In the foreground, the back of a person's head is visible as they watch the presentation. As the scene progresses, the woman gestures with her hands and shifts her position slightly while speaking. To the right of the screen, a black chair is partially visible against a beige wall.
